title: Storm model: benchmark vs. operational skill (generalisation check)
task: P(Kp>=5 within 24h) from L1 solar wind (OMNI)

eras.operational: 2021-01-01..2025-01-01 (unseen later era, different solar-cycle phase: 11669 windows, 1032 storms)

method.bootstrap: moving-block bootstrap, 500 replicates, 7-day blocks (storm windows autocorrelate — i.i.d. resampling would understate uncertainty)
method.note: operational era spans a different solar-cycle phase; that IS part of what deployment faces, not a confound to remove
